title: Odal Node — Detergent Sector Data (v1.1.0)
description: Detergent and surfactant fields per EU Regulation 2026/405. DPP mandate 2029. Surfactant concentrations use the EU-standard disclosure bands from Annex VII (same bands as Regulation 648/2004 labelling tradition). v1.1.0 renames countryOfManufacture to countryOfOrigin for cross-sector naming consistency.

surfactants.description: List of surfactants in the product formulation. All must be readily biodegradable per EU 2026/405 (no derogations).

co2ePerUnitKg.description: Carbon footprint in kg CO2e per product unit.

packagingRecyclable.description: Whether the primary packaging is recyclable.

recommendedDosageMl.description: Recommended dosage in millilitres (or grams for powder).

biodegradable.description: Summary flag: whether all surfactants are readily biodegradable.

name.description: INCI or IUPAC name of the surfactant.

biodegradable.description: Whether the surfactant is readily biodegradable per EU 2026/405 (ultimate biodegradability). All surfactants must be true; false triggers NON_COMPLIANT.

concentrationBand.description: Concentration band per EU detergent labelling convention (Annex VII). Use the band that contains the actual w/w percentage.
